provenanceCaveat: prod currently has no generation_request provenance table, so generated rows cannot be excluded directly
classifierNotes: Weapon-vs-spell context: ranged weapons use both % Weapon Damage and % Spell Damage as ranged signals; melee weapons use % Weapon Damage as melee signal
Element classification is rough and flags multi/omni for review
AP/MP in raw item stat fields are item-granted; Total AP/Total MP add the level-200 character base of 7 AP and 3 MP.
